subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned his face toward the Countenance of his Lord and drawn nigh unto God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. O Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن توجه الی وجه مولئه و اقبل به الله المهیمن القیوم ان یا قلم الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
